issue_summary: Don't delegate the file constructor to the path constructor
javadoc_before:
/** * Construct an entry for a file. File is set to file, and the * header is constructed from information from the file. * The name is set from the normalized file path. * *

The entry's name will be the value of the {@code file}'s * path with all file separators replaced by forward slashes and * leading slashes as well as Windows drive letters stripped. The * name will end in a slash if the {@code file} represents a * directory.

* * @param file The file that the entry represents. * @since 1.21 */
javadoc_after:
/** * Construct an entry for a file. File is set to file, and the * header is constructed from information from the file. * The name is set from the normalized file path. * *

The entry's name will be the value of the {@code file}'s * path with all file separators replaced by forward slashes and * leading slashes as well as Windows drive letters stripped. The * name will end in a slash if the {@code file} represents a * directory.

* * @param file The file that the entry represents. * @throws IOException if an I/O error occurs * @since 1.21 */
